description.en: The span a SENSOR can read this quantity over — the instrument side (VIM 4.7 measuring interval / ssn-system MeasurementRange), not the thing's own behaviour.
Rated continuous / within-spec — the region the quantity is rated to range over in normal use.
The region beyond which external protection must clear the fault.
The threshold band that brings the feature online.
The span endured without damage (superset of operating) — beyond it the thing is harmed.
